text.title: Search Campaign and Ad Group Creation
text.summary: Search campaign creation with network settings, ad group creation with CPC bids, and bid update patterns.

rule.statement: Set target_google_search=True and target_content_network=False for a pure Search campaign. The default includes the content network, which mixes display inventory into search campaigns.
rule.rationale: Content network (Display) traffic has much lower intent than search traffic. Including it distorts Quality Score, CTR, and conversion rate metrics.

list.item: target_search_network: True — Google Search partner sites (optional)
target_partner_search_network: False — exclude partner search network

rule.statement: All monetary values use micros (1/1,000,000 of currency unit). 1,000,000 micros = $1.00. Always divide by 1_000_000 when displaying or comparing to human-readable amounts.
rule.rationale: Micros are used throughout the Google Ads API (budget, bids, cost metrics). Forgetting to convert produces 1,000,000x wrong values.

list.item: SEARCH_DYNAMIC_ADS: Dynamic Search Ads that auto-generate headlines from page content

rule.statement: Use an update_mask (field_mask) when updating ad group bids. Sending an update operation without a field mask resets all unspecified fields to defaults.
rule.rationale: Without a field mask, the API interprets missing fields as "clear to default," which can reset bidding strategy, status, and other settings silently.
